Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION

Title: Relates to requiring the office of victim assistance to notify crime victims of the availability of victim support services
Summary: Requires the office of victim assistance to notify crime victims of the availability of victim support services by providing such victims with a written notice of the availability of statewide programs.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the correction law, in relation to requiring the office of victim assistance to notify crime victims of the availability of victim support services
